description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times. Each hit inflicts Stun for [0.5sec->0.6 sec]. When landing a Critical Hit, restores Mana by 100. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to [7%->1.4%] ATK per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and inflicts Stun for [1sec->1.2 sec]. Non-hero enemies take plus additional Magic DMG equal to [40%->7.8%] ATK per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to all enemies 5 times. This attack applies Critical DMG [160% increased->150% higher], and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to [10%->2.3%] ATK per [Ember] stack.
On hit, applies an [Ember] stack to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30. [Ember] : Deals Damage over Time every 1 sec for 20 sec, and stacks up to [10->12] times.

light.unified: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by [20%->40%] for [5 sec->10 sec].
Each [Ember] stack [increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 1%->reduces the target’s Magic DEF by 2.5%].

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, stuns [enemies->one enemy] with [Ember] for [1 sec->1.2 sec]. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for [1.5 sec->1.8 sec] instead.

description.unified: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1] and increases DMG by {0}%.

[Fire Rain] Increases DMG by [20%->{0}%]. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by [ {0}%->5%]. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional [5%->20%].
[Flame Diffusion] [Ember becomes irremovable and causes the target to take {0}% increased M.DMG per stack->Changes Ember max stacks to 14 and increases Ember DMG by {0}%].

dark.unified: Targets with 10 or more [Ember] stacks take 30% increased Magic DMG and apply [1 [Ember] stack->2 [Ember] stacks] to all non-hero enemies every second. [ (removed) [Ember] becomes non-dispellable].

description.unified: [Attack Speed->Critical Rate] increases by {0}, [(removed) Critical DMG increases by {1}], and Skill Attacks deal additional [Magic DMG->DMG] equal to [{1}%->{2}%] [ (added) of ATK] per [Ember] stack on the target.
